---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Burot plugin
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the Bug**

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g., "The plugin didn't trigger a Discord notification when I got a new personal best at Zulrah.")

**Exact In-Game Chat Message (CRITICAL)**

Please provide the exact, word-for-word chat message from the game that caused the issue (or should have triggered the plugin). Because this plugin reads chat messages to trigger notifications, we cannot fix the bug without knowing the exact text the game sent.

**Expected Behavior**

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. (e.g., "I expected a Discord webhook notification with the text 'Player has achieved a new Zulrah personal best: 1:05.00' and the record sound to play.")

**Actual Behavior**

What actually happened? (e.g., "Nothing happened. No sound played and no Discord message was sent.")

**Steps to Reproduce**

Go to '...'

Do '...'

See error '...'

**Plugin Configuration**

Please list the relevant settings you have enabled/disabled in the Burot plugin settings:

Relevant Feature Toggle: [e.g., Notify New Records: On]

Relevant Sub-Category: [e.g., Bosses: On]

Custom Sound Path: [e.g., None, or C:\sounds\custom.wav]

**Screenshots**

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. A screenshot of the in-game chat box is highly recommended.

**Environment**

OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS, Linux]

RuneLite Version: [e.g. 1.10.3]

Burot Plugin Version: [e.g. 1.0-SNAPSHOT]

**Client Logs**

If the plugin threw an actual error, please attach your client.log file.
You can find this in C:\Users\"USER"\.runelite\logs if you have a default installation.
